[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110111011 8
1 0100101000 3
2 1110101111 8
3 0010001110 4
4 0111111110 8
5 1111111101 9
6 1011111111 9
7 1111110011 8

70 0011010011 5
